primary_function: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify scripts use sync_playwright() for synchronous execution
Confirm browser.close() is called at script completion
Ensure page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle') is used before DOM inspection on dynamic apps
Validate scripts run with_server.py helper with --help flag first
Confirm scripts use headless=True for chromium.launch()
Verify proper server port configuration in goto() calls
Ensure reconnaissance-then-action pattern is followed for dynamic webapps
Confirm scripts avoid reading helper script source code unnecessarily
Validate use of descriptive selectors (text=, role=, CSS, IDs)
Verify appropriate waits are included (wait_for_selector, wait_for_timeout)
trigger_text: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
